message: Hello! I found you through Instagram and I absolutely love your work. I'm getting married in November 2026 and would love to have a custom wedding dress made. Could we schedule a consultation? I'm based in Barcelona. Budget is flexible — I'm more focused on finding the right designer.
draft: Hello Lucía! Thank you so much for reaching out — I'd love to create something special for your November wedding. I'm based in Barcelona and do offer in-person consultations. Could you let me know which dates work best for you in the coming weeks? Looking forward to hearing more about your vision! 🤍
